title: nepeta × secundarei
intro: Nepeta × secundarei, also known as catmint, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the mint family, derived from the cross between Nepeta faassenii and Nepeta racemosa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Nepeta × secundarei include reducing anxiety and stress, relieving insomnia, and soothing digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
